title: Software Engineer (Mid-level)
text: We are looking for a mid-level Software Engineer proficient in Python, React, REST APIs, Git, SQL, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP). Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and agile methodologies is required.

title: Data Analyst
text: Seeking a Data Analyst skilled in SQL, Python (pandas, numpy), Excel, Tableau, and statistical analysis. Experience with data cleaning, ETL pipelines, and business intelligence dashboards preferred.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
text: ML Engineer role requiring proficiency in Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, scikit-learn, MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud ML services (SageMaker/Vertex AI). Strong background in statistics and model deployment required.

title: DevOps Engineer
text: DevOps Engineer with expertise in Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins/GitHub Actions, AWS/Azure, Linux, Python scripting, and monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana).

title: Marketing Manager
text: Marketing Manager with skills in SEO/SEM, Google Analytics, HubSpot CRM, social media management, email marketing, content strategy, and campaign performance analysis.

title: Warehouse Supervisor
text: Warehouse Supervisor requiring OSHA safety certification, inventory management (WMS), forklift operation, logistics coordination, team leadership, and lean/5S methodology.

title: Registered Nurse
text: RN position requiring BSN, active nursing license, patient care, EHR systems (Epic/Cerner), HIPAA compliance, triage, IV therapy, and critical care experience.

title: Financial Analyst
text: Financial Analyst skilled in Excel (advanced), financial modeling, DCF valuation, SQL, Python (for analysis), Bloomberg Terminal, and PowerPoint. CFA Level 1 preferred.
